# Weblyfe.ai

> Weblyfe builds custom AI agents, chatbots, and workflow automations for creators, agencies, and service businesses. Our flagship product is Appie — an autonomous AI employee powered by OpenClaw that handles emails, calendar, leads, and business operations 24/7.

## What We Do

Weblyfe is an AI automation agency based in the Netherlands (Techwiz LLC), serving clients worldwide. We design and deploy:

- **Custom AI Agents (Appie)**: Autonomous digital employees that run on your own server, connect to all your tools, and handle operations 24/7 through Telegram or WhatsApp.
- **Workflow Automation**: n8n and Zapier-based automations that connect 400+ apps including Notion, Gmail, HubSpot, Airtable, Webflow, and Stripe.
- **AI Chatbots**: Custom-trained chatbots for lead qualification, customer support, and sales — trained on your brand voice.
- **AI-Powered CRM**: Automated lead tracking, follow-up sequences, and pipeline management.
- **Training Bots**: Internal AI assistants that answer employee and customer questions based on your documentation.

## Technology

- **OpenClaw**: Our core AI runtime — an agent operating system with persistent memory, multi-agent orchestration, and deep tool integrations.
- **Stack**: Next.js, Vercel, Supabase, n8n, Claude (Anthropic), OpenRouter, Telegram/WhatsApp APIs.
- **Infrastructure**: Private deployment on DigitalOcean or client's own cloud. Data never leaves your infrastructure.

## Key Results

- Clients save 20+ hours per week after AI deployment.
- First AI agent (Appie) handles emails, calendar, research, CRM updates, and social monitoring autonomously.
- Notable clients: Lost LeBlanc (YouTube creator), BeyondSchool, Dubai Property Group, Stickx Arcade, IOnlyBookVIP.

## Services & Pricing

- **OpenClaw Agent** (Starter): Custom AI agent + Telegram/WhatsApp + email/calendar + web research + basic automations. Setup included.
- **AI Infrastructure** (Full Stack): Multi-agent architecture + command center dashboard + n8n workflows + CRM automation + ongoing support.
- Custom pricing based on scope. Projects start at €2,500. Book a free strategy call at https://tidycal.com/weblyfe/hey.
